intended_reader: Maintainers deciding whether source-bound documentation is worth adding to a repository.
limits: This page replays recorded deterministic evidence; it does not execute in the browser.
The fixture proves one region-binding workflow, not every supported extractor.
prerequisites: No account, credentials, backend, or database.
The outputs below come from a generated temporary repository.

steps.output:
[drift] public-command: README.md
--- README.md
+++ README.md (derived)
@@ -7,5 +7,5 @@
 ## Command
 
 <!-- sourcebound:begin public-command -->
-sourcebound check
+sourcebound check --changed
 <!-- sourcebound:end public-command -->

[repaired] public-command: README.md
--- README.md
+++ README.md (derived)
@@ -7,5 +7,5 @@
 ## Command
 
 <!-- sourcebound:begin public-command -->
-sourcebound check
+sourcebound check --changed
 <!-- sourcebound:end public-command -->
drive: repaired 1 document(s); implemented policy checks passed

title: Make stale prose fail loudly.
value: One binding connects a command in source to its README claim. When the source changes alone, the check fails with the exact stale region; repair rewrites that region and nothing else.
